structured.name: Change Availability EVSE/Connector
structured.objective:
To enable the CSMS to change the availability of an EVSE or Connector to Operative or
Inoperative .
structured.description:
This use case covers how the CSMS requests the Charging Station to change the availability of
one of the EVSEs or Connectors to Operative or Inoperative. An EVSE/Connector is
considered Operative in any status other than Faulted and Unavailable.
scenario:
1. The CSMS sends ChangeAvailabilityRequest requesting a Charging Station to change the
availability of an EVSE or Connector.

2. The Charging Station changes the availability to the EVSE/Connector to the requested
operationalStatus from the ChangeAvailabilityRequest.

3. Upon receipt of ChangeAvailabilityRequest, the Charging Station responds with
ChangeAvailabilityResponse. In case that the status 'Scheduled' is reported in the
ChangeAvailabilityResponse, a transaction was running and this will be finished first.
4. The Charging Station reports the status of the EVSE/Connector using a NotifyEventRequest.
structured.postconditions:
Successful postcondition:
When changing the availability of an EVSE/Connector to Operative, the status of the EVSE has
changed to Available, Occupied or Reserved.
When changing the availability of an EVSE/Connector to Inoperative , the status of the EVSE
has changed to Unavailable.
Failure postcondition:
The status of the EVSE is as it was just before the Charging Station received
ChangeAvailabilityRequest and not according to the requested Availability.
structured.remarks:
Availabilty state set by ChangeAvailabilityRequest persists after a reboot. For example, if EVSE is
set to Unavailable it remains unavailable after reboot.

requirements.definition:
The Charging Station SHALL respond with
ChangeAvailabilityResponse.

This response message SHALL indicate whether
the Charging Station is able to change to the
requested availability.

requirements.precondition:
In the event that CSMS requests the
Charging Station to change an EVSE
or Connector to the state it is already
in.
requirements.definition:
The Charging Station SHALL respond with
availability status Accepted.

requirements.precondition:
When an availability change request
with ChangeAvailabilityRequest has
changed the state of a Connector.
requirements.definition:
The Charging Station SHALL inform the CSMS of its
new Connector availability status with
StatusNotificationRequest or NotifyEventRequest.

requirements.precondition:
When a transaction is in progress
AND NOT G03.FR.03
requirements.definition:
The Charging Station SHALL respond with
availability status Scheduled to indicate that it is
scheduled to occur after the transaction has
finished.

requirements.precondition:
When the availability of an EVSE
becomes Inoperative (Unavailable,
Faulted)
requirements.definition:
All operative connectors (i.e. not Faulted) of that
EVSE SHALL become Unavailable.

requirements.precondition:
When the availability of an EVSE
becomes Operative
requirements.definition:
The Charging Station SHALL revert the status of all
connectors of that EVSE to their original status.

requirements.precondition:
When the availability of an EVSE or
Connector has been set explicitly via
ChangeAvailabilityRequest
requirements.definition:
The set availability state SHALL be persistent
across reboot/power loss.

requirements.precondition:
The connector is Reserved when an
EV is connecting AND
EV driver has not presented an
IdToken matching the reservation

sub_scenarios.objective: Reserve a specific EVSE at a Charging Station
steps: 1. EV Driver asks the CSMS to reserve a specific EVSE at the Charging Station.
2. The CSMS sends ReserveNowRequest with a EVSE to a Charging Station.

3. Upon receipt of ReserveNowRequest, the Charging Station responds with
ReserveNowResponse with status Accepted.

4. The Charging Station sends StatusNotificationRequest with the status Reserved for all
Connectors of that EVSE.
5. The CSMS responds with StatusNotificationResponse to the Charging Station.

sub_scenarios.objective: Reserve a connector type at a Charging Station
steps: 1. EV Driver asks the CSMS to reserve a connector type at the Charging Station.
2. The CSMS sends ReserveNowRequest with a connector type to a Charging Station.

3. Upon receipt of ReserveNowRequest, the Charging Station responds with
ReserveNowResponse with status Accepted.
sub_scenarios.prerequisites: The Charging Station has at least one available EVSE with the specified connector type
sub_scenarios.postconditions:
Successful postcondition:
The Charging Station has accepted the ReserveNowRequest
Failure postcondition:
The Charging Station has rejected the ReserveNowRequest

chunks.content:
# G03 - Change Availability EVSE/Connector

**Objective:** To enable the CSMS to change the availability of an EVSE or Connector to Operative or
Inoperative .

**Description:** This use case covers how the CSMS requests the Charging Station to change the availability of
one of the EVSEs or Connectors to Operative or Inoperative. An EVSE/Connector is
considered Operative in any status other than Faulted and Unavailable.

**Actors:** Charging Station, CSMS

**Scenario:**
1. The CSMS sends ChangeAvailabilityRequest requesting a Charging Station to change the
availability of an EVSE or Connector.
2. The Charging Station changes the availability to the EVSE/Connector to the requested
operationalStatus from the ChangeAvailabilityRequest.
3. Upon receipt of ChangeAvailabilityRequest, the Charging Station responds with
ChangeAvailabilityResponse. In case that the status 'Scheduled' is reported in the
ChangeAvailabilityResponse, a transaction was running and this will be finished first.
4. The Charging Station reports the status of the EVSE/Connector using a NotifyEventRequest.

**Prerequisites:** n/a

**Postconditions:** Successful postcondition:
When changing the availability of an EVSE/Connector to Operative, the status of the EVSE has
changed to Available, Occupied or Reserved.
When changing the availability of an EVSE/Connector to Inoperative , the status of the EVSE
has changed to Unavailable.
Failure postcondition:
The status of the EVSE is as it was just before the Charging Station received
ChangeAvailabilityRequest and not according to the requested Availability.

**Remarks:** Availabilty state set by ChangeAvailabilityRequest persists after a reboot. For example, if EVSE is
set to Unavailable it remains unavailable after reboot.

# G03 - Requirements

**G03.FR.01**
Precondition: Upon receipt of
ChangeAvailabilityRequest.
The Charging Station SHALL respond with
ChangeAvailabilityResponse.

**G03.FR.02**
Precondition: G03.FR.01
This response message SHALL indicate whether
the Charging Station is able to change to the
requested availability.

**G03.FR.03**
Precondition: In the event that CSMS requests the
Charging Station to change an EVSE
or Connector to the state it is already
in.
The Charging Station SHALL respond with
availability status Accepted.

**G03.FR.04**
Precondition: When an availability change request
with ChangeAvailabilityRequest has
changed the state of a Connector.
The Charging Station SHALL inform the CSMS of its
new Connector availability status with
StatusNotificationRequest or NotifyEventRequest.

**G03.FR.05**
Precondition: When a transaction is in progress
AND NOT G03.FR.03
The Charging Station SHALL respond with
availability status Scheduled to indicate that it is
scheduled to occur after the transaction has
finished.

**G03.FR.06**
Precondition: When the availability of an EVSE
becomes Inoperative (Unavailable,
Faulted)
All operative connectors (i.e. not Faulted) of that
EVSE SHALL become Unavailable.

**G03.FR.07**
Precondition: When the availability of an EVSE
becomes Operative
The Charging Station SHALL revert the status of all
connectors of that EVSE to their original status.

**G03.FR.08**
Precondition: When the availability of an EVSE or
Connector has been set explicitly via
ChangeAvailabilityRequest
The set availability state SHALL be persistent
across reboot/power loss.

**G03.FR.09**
Precondition: The connector is Reserved when an
EV is connecting AND
EV driver has not presented an
IdToken matching the reservation
Connector status SHALL NOT change.
